2605.18476.title: AI4BayesCode: From Natural Language Descriptions to Validated Modular Stateful Bayesian Samplers
2605.18476.paper_summary: Coding and computation remain major bottlenecks in Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) workflows, especially as modern sampling algorithms have become increasingly complex and existing probabilistic programming systems remain limited in model support, extensibility, and composability. We introduce \textbf{AI4BayesCode}, an extensible LLM-driven system that translates natural-language Bayesian model descriptions into runnable, validated MCMC samplers. To improve reliability, AI4BayesCode adopts a modular design that decomposes models into modular sampling blocks and maps each block to a built-in sampling component, reducing the need to implement complex sampling algorithms from scratch. Reliability is further improved through pre-generation validation of model specifications and post-generation validation of generated sampler code. AI4BayesCode also introduces a novel recursively stateful coding paradigm for MCMC, allowing modular sampling components, potentially developed by different contributors, to be composed coherently within larger MCMC procedures. We develop a benchmark suite to evaluate AI4BayesCode for sampler-generation. Experiments show that AI4BayesCode can implement a wide range of Bayesian models from natural-language descriptions alone. As an open-ended system, its capability can continue to expand with improvements in the underlying AI agent and the addition of new built-in blocks.
2605.18476.paper_summary_zh: 編碼和計算仍然是馬爾可夫鏈蒙特卡羅（MCMC）工作流程中的主要瓶頸，尤其是隨著現代取樣算法變得越來越複雜，而現有的概率編程系統在模型支持、可擴展性和可組合性方面仍然有限。<lb/>我們介紹了\textbf{AI4BayesCode}，這是一個可擴展的LLM驅動系統，將自然語言的貝葉斯模型描述轉換為可運行的、經過驗證的MCMC取樣器。<lb/>為了提高可靠性，AI4BayesCode採用了模塊化設計，將模型分解為模塊化取樣塊，並將每個塊映射到內置的取樣組件，從而減少了從頭實現複雜取樣算法的需求。<lb/>通過對模型規範的預生成驗證和對生成的取樣器代碼的後生成驗證，進一步提高了可靠性。<lb/>AI4BayesCode還引入了一種新穎的遞歸有狀態編碼範式，用於MCMC，允許由不同貢獻者開發的模塊化取樣組件在更大的MCMC程序中進行一致的組合。<lb/>我們開發了一個基準套件來評估AI4BayesCode的取樣器生成能力。<lb/>實驗表明，AI4BayesCode僅根據自然語言描述就能實現各種貝葉斯模型。<lb/>作為一個開放式系統，其能力可以隨著基礎AI代理的改進和新內置模塊的添加而不斷擴展。
2605.18476.author: Jungang Zou et.al.
2605.18476.authors: Jungang Zou, Alex Ziyu Jiang, Qixuan Chen
